title: Draught Excluder Self Adhesive Foam Tape 6mm(W) x 3mm(T) Window Door Weather Stripping SoundProof Weather Strip Tape Seals for Gap Seal, 2 Rolls, Total 20M Long White
features: 【Strong Adhesive】The self-adhesive foam sealing strip with updated strong grid adhesive backing is not only super adhesive, ensure adhesion to any material surface. It is waterproof and non-degumming. Once installed, it offers long-term protection.

【High Density Foam Tape】Closed cell foam strip Provides a perfect air-tight seal, heat insulation, weather proof, oil resistance, resistant to corrosion, dust proof, shock-absorbing, buffering, sealing, flame retardant, anti-skidding and insulating.

【Highly resilient and Adjustable】This self-Adhesive foam strip is flexible enough to compress flat to form a seal with any shape, and can quickly come back to original shape. foam tape is easy enough to customize and cut to size with scissors or blade.

【Widely Use】This Self Adhesive Foam Tape is made of eco-friendly material, CR foam and neoprene, which is weatherproof, chemical corrosion resistant, dustproof, shockproof, leakproof, flame retardant, soundproof, heat insulation insulating, can be used from -50℃ to 150℃ . Widely used in various door seal and window insulation, as a sound absorbing material, sealing and insulating material for air conditioner or refrigerator.

【More Size Choices】The weather stripping has multiple sizes. Supplied in a resealable bag. For easy use in a resealable bag for next use. If you are not satisfied with the self-adhesive sealing strip, please contact us immediately, we will give you all the money back or send you new products freely.
description: Product Description Closed Cell Foam Tape with multiple function Self adhesive foam tape have excellent weather resistance, which not only works well to wind insulation, noise reduction, energy saving, but also forming a barrier against drafts and humidity, as well as dust, pollen and insects during warmer months, Say goodbye to odor, moisture, dust or other hazardous and unpleasant elements. Get a quiet and tidy home. Easy installation, brings convenience and long-term protection for your home! STRONG GRID ADHESIVE We use only premium adhesives on every GUKOY's doors and window seal, which stick firmly. In addition, no more worries of degumming or glue residue due to the unique grid adhesive backing design. High Density Foam Excellent resistance to compression and deformation, strong elasticity and durability. The foam seal can quickly return to its original shape after compression and has good buffering or cushioning performance, ensuring all-day protection. Widely Used The adhesive foam strips are widely used in various door seal and window insulation, furniture, electrical cabinets, cars, speakers, toys, handicrafts, sports equipments, etc. Draught Excluder Self Adhesive Foam Tape 6mm(W) x 3mm(T) Window Door Weather ...
